name: Raspberry Mojito
description: A fruity mojito made with BACARDÍ Raspberry rum, mint, lime, raspberries, sugar, and club soda. A raspberry twist on the classic mojito for a kick of fruity flavour.
recipe_steps: Build all ingredients in a highball glass and lightly muddle.
Top with club soda and stir lightly before serving.
Garnish with a sprig of fresh mint and a raspberry.
searchable_text: Raspberry Mojito main rum BACARDÍ Raspberry rum A fruity mojito made with BACARDÍ Raspberry rum, mint, lime, raspberries, sugar, and club soda. A raspberry twist on the classic mojito for a kick of fruity flavour. ingredients 50 ml BACARDÍ Raspberry rum, 3 raspberries, 4 lime wedges, 2 tsp sugar, 12 mint leaves, top with club soda recipe steps Build all ingredients in a highball glass and lightly muddle. Add crushed ice and stir. Top with club soda and stir lightly before serving. Garnish with a sprig of fresh mint and a raspberry.
